name: atelier
description: AI task/procedure/runtime layer for agentic workflows

interface.shortDescription: Atelier tools and trace capture for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundle the Atelier MCP transport, skills, and trace capture for Codex. The standard Atelier install registers Atelier as a real Codex MCP server and uses native Codex tools only as explicit fallback when an Atelier tool is hidden, unavailable, or returns noop.
defaultPrompt: Use Atelier MCP tools first for reads, search, edits, and shell work. If an Atelier tool is hidden, unavailable, or returns noop, fall back to native Codex tools and still return findings.
